---
name: Feature request
about: Idea for something new, or a workflow that isn't working well for you
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Ideas are welcome at any stage** — rough sketches, half-formed thoughts, or fully detailed proposals. If you've cloned this project, your perspective on what's missing is exactly what I need.

## What problem are you trying to solve?
<!-- Describe the situation where you felt something was missing or frustrating -->

## What would you like to see?
<!-- Describe the feature or behavior you'd want -->

## Why does it matter?
<!-- Optional — but if there's a clinical or UX reason behind it, that helps prioritize -->

## Anything you've already tried?
<!-- Workarounds, related tools, or approaches you've explored -->
